field_calculator.description: Evaluates SQL-style and expression-style formulas per feature with optional conditional updates and preview payload support.

input.label: Input vector layer.
input.tooltip: Select a vector layer. Provider URIs are normalized to backend-friendly paths when possible.

field.label: Target field name to create or update.
field.tooltip: If the field does not exist it will be created. If it exists, enable overwrite to replace values.

field_type.label: Target field type: float, integer, text. [optional]
field_type.tooltip: Controls casting for created fields and computed values.

expression.label: Expression or SQL UPDATE assignment evaluated per feature.
expression.tooltip: Supports CASE WHEN, simple CASE, CAST(... AS type), SQL operators, IS NULL / IS NOT NULL, and optional UPDATE ... SET ... WHERE wrappers.

overwrite.label: Overwrite existing field values when target already exists. [optional]
overwrite.tooltip: Set to true to update values in an existing field.

preview_rows.label: Optional preview row count (preview-only run when output omitted). [optional]
preview_rows.tooltip: When > 0, returns preview rows and normalized expression details; output may be omitted for preview-only evaluation.

output.label: Output vector path (optional when preview_rows > 0). [optional]
output.tooltip: Provide an output path for final write. Omit for preview-only evaluation.
